dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a field captain still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Orien Warderose is a field captain anchored to Fashion Artisans Collective, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.

setting_placement.location_setting: House Shelk-aligned fashion network that organizes designers, workshops, apprentices, and cultural showcases.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of Fashion Artisans Collective

public_vs_private.public_face: Recognized as a field captain of regional weight. Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Orien Warderose as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Orien Warderose presents as Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a field captain still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Orien Warderose as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Fashion Artisans Collective workable through the obligations of field captain while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk. Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around Fashion Artisans Collective, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of field captain visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around Fashion Artisans Collective, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of field captain visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Field Captain, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Fashion Artisans Collective workable through the obligations of field captain while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for route scrutiny and contraband control, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Orien Warderose can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Field Captain too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a field captain still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Orien Warderose adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Fashion Artisans Collective learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Orien Warderose or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Orien Warderose as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Fashion Artisans Collective: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Orien Warderose can propagate upward through Shelk if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

relationships.note: Both tied to Fashion Artisans Collective.

hooks.summary: Orien Warderose can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Fashion Artisans Collective.
Any task accepted from Orien Warderose may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Orien Warderose needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Fashion Artisans Collective.
Orien Warderose needs help with a problem in Fashion Artisans Collective that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Fashion Artisans Collective: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Field Captain.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
